Import all data

Source: R/import.R
import_all_data.Rd

This function is a wrapper for the mpactr import_data function. It will import your peak table and meta data and create a mpactr_object.

Usage

import_all_data(peak_table, meta_data, format)

Arguments

peak_table

The file path to your feature table file.

meta_data

The file path to your meta_data file or data.frame.

format

The expected exported type of your peak table, can be one of "Progenesis", "Metaboscape", "None".

Value

a mpactr object.

Examples

data <-
   import_all_data(peak_table =
                   mums2::mums2_example("full_mix_peak_table_small.csv"),
                   meta_data =
                   mums2::mums2_example("full_mix_meta_data_small.csv"),
                   format = "Metaboscape")
#> If peak table has corrupted compound names they will be converted to
#>       utf-8 and if there are any commas, they will be converted to periods(.).

On this page
